rows.label: qev091503_MSG0001
rows.name: Looks like that's the last of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091503_MSG0002
rows.name: I'm glad I had you here with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091503_MSG0003
rows.name:
Honestly, I'd never have received a
mission like this if not for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091503_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm thankful for all the
work we've done together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091503_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Fog Christoph that he got where he is through his own efforts.

rows.label: qev091503_SEL0021
rows.name: Remind Fog Christoph how awesome your advice is.

rows.label: qev091503_MSG0006
rows.name: It was you who pulled that out of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091503_MSG0007
rows.name:
Heh. You and my brother have
the same sense of humor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091503_MSG0012
rows.name:
Part of the Growth's eastern force diverted
to Bedrock Hold. Frye is pinned down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091503_MSG0013
rows.name: We need to get there ASAP![ST:wait ]
